rejected_designs.reason: not selected for the immediate repair because it requires a separate operator-compression design before implementation

exact_when: neighborhood mask contains every previous-state coordinate on which each RK4 transition-mean coordinate depends
blocks_when: process covariance is non-diagonal and no separate reviewed covariance-factorization route is supplied
dependency mask is truncated for memory without declaring approximation status
route-width bound exceeds the configured memory cap
applicability.approximation_status: exact local contraction under diagonal covariance and full reachability-mask conditions; otherwise block before implementation or declare a separate approximation plan

derivation.transition_factorization: log K_theta(x,z)=sum_a log Normal(x_a; Phi_a(z_N_a), sigma_a^2) for diagonal process covariance
derivation.neighborhood_definition: N_a is the coordinate reachability set obtained by composing the SpatialSIRSSM one-step RK4 dependency graph for rk4_substeps steps
derivation.contraction_target: sum over previous retained-grid coordinates using local factors and TT retained density without enumerating all current-previous global pairs
gradient_variables: route metadata is non-differentiable replay state

metadata_contract.route_width_bound_formula: max_a q^(|N_a|) times local TT-rank contraction factors, reported conservatively from basis order q and max dependency-neighborhood size
metadata_contract.memory_forecast_formula: O(d * q^w * r_left * r_right) local workspace plus retained TT cores, where w=max_a |N_a|

tieout_contract.baseline: dense retained-grid route; P53 C_low predictive update is admissible only as a computational proxy because P53-M3 already tied C_low to the dense route
metadata_checks: memory forecast finite and below configured cap for the tie-out fixture
no dense all-pairs global pair enumeration

nonclaims: no d=50 or d=100 spatial SIR readiness
